questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
In the following sequence of reactions all stereoisomers of $(X)$ have been taken.
Here $\quad P=$ Total number of stereoisomers of $X$ $Q=$ Total number of stereoisomers of $Y$ $R=$ Total number of stereoisomers of $Z$ What is sum of $P, Q$ and $R$ in the above reaction.
questions.solution:
$X$ has 3 stereocentres with similar ends. Hence, 6

stereocentres, hence 4 stereoisomers.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
